title: Deploy VPN client profile v2.3
description: Roll out keepalive fix for VPN disconnect issue affecting remote users.

title: Tune Exchange transport queues
description: Queue and cache tuning for sync latency.

title: Add payroll DB composite index
description: Index to reduce deadlock frequency on payroll_transactions table.

title: Wi-Fi channel plan correction
description: Apply channel pinning for floor 5 APs.

title: Identity replication tuning
description: Tune replication worker batch size for MFA resets.

title: Portal attachment retry patch
description: Deploy retry backoff fix for ITSM portal attachment uploads.

title: ERP app pool memory increase
description: Increase memory reservation for ERP login service.

title: Renew CMDB probe certificates
description: Replace expiring cert chain and restart CMDB probe service.

title: Scale monitoring collectors
description: Add two collectors for network pipelines.

title: Adjust KB ranking weights
description: Reduce stale-content boost and retrain rank profile.

title: Increase SAP application server connection pool to 500
description: Increase the SAP S/4HANA application server JDBC connection pool from 200 to 500 to handle peak morning login load and resolve PBM9001001.

title: Add consumer group tags to internal service accounts in Kong
description: Tag all internal microservice consumer accounts in Kong API Gateway with the 'internal-services' consumer group to exempt them from the global rate-limit policy. Resolves PBM8001001.
